widgets_values: a bouncing pawn chess piece,  on its last move the pawn jumps and destroys in several pieces the black soldier. add contact shadows and dynamic elements like subtle puffs of smoke on each bounce and some small fractured pieces on the chess board
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

Resolution Setting:
1 = 576p | 2 = 720p | 3 = Custom Resolution

Custom Width and Height are only activated, if Resolution is set to 3.
